one_time_description: Land Claim Settlement revenue received in prior year (2019: $120,959,663); large trust fund balance remains from settlement
economic_notes: Band has significant land claim settlement trust funds (~$81.7M). Trust agreement allows up to 85% of net income to be used for operations. Investment portfolio consists mainly of common stocks with unrealized loss of $5,770,405 as at March 31, 2020. Subsidiaries include 1769919 Alberta Ltd. (Ventures) and Lubicon Lake Forestry. COVID-19 declared a global pandemic in March 2020 with uncertain impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2020. Large land claim settlement of ~$120.96M was received in fiscal 2019, resulting in unusually high prior year revenue. In 2020 the trust fund balance (~$81.7M) is reflected in accumulated surplus. OSR is negative because deferred revenue netting reduces total reported revenue below government transfers. Two subsidiaries (1769919 Alberta Ltd. and Lubicon Lake Forestry) are accounted for by equity method rather than full consolidation. No schedule of remuneration provided. Promissory note of $7,959,658 was fully repaid in 2020. Unrealized investment loss of $5,770,405 noted. COVID-19 subsequent event disclosed.
